tool_calls: cd /home/eval && if [ -f /app/package.json ]; then cat /app/package.json; else echo 'missing'; fi
pwd; ls -la /; ls -la /app 2>/dev/null || true; cat /app/package.json 2>/dev/null || true

if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const p="/app/package.json"; const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8")); pkg.version="2.0.0"; pkg.main="dist/index.js"; pkg.dependencies=pkg.dependencies||{}; pkg.dependencies.lodash="^4.17.21"; fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2)+"\n"); console.log(fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8"));'; elif command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then tmp=$(mktemp); jq '.version="2.0.0" | .main="dist/index.js" | .dependencies.lodash="^4.17.21"' /app/package.json > "$tmp" && mv "$tmp" /app/package.json && cat /app/package.json; else sed -i 's/"version":"1\.2\.3"/"version":"2.0.0"/; s/"main":"src\/index\.js"/"main":"dist\/index.js"/; s/"dependencies":{\([^}]*\)}/"dependencies":{\1,"lodash":"^4.17.21"}/' /app/package.json; cat /app/package.json; fi

tool_outputs.commands: cd /home/eval && if [ -f /app/package.json ]; then cat /app/package.json; else echo 'missing'; fi
